incident.message: The id `R.id.chatbotToolbar` has already been looked up in this method; possible cut & paste error?
The id `R.id.networkToolbar` has already been looked up in this method; possible cut & paste error?
The id `R.id.scanToolbar` has already been looked up in this method; possible cut & paste error?
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead

Using internal inset dimension resource `status_bar_height` is not supported
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
Avoid passing `null` as the view root (needed to resolve layout parameters on the inflated layout's root element)
Avoid passing `null` as the view root (needed to resolve layout parameters on the inflated layout's root element)
A newer version of com.android.application than 8.13.2 is available: 9.1.0
A newer version of `compileSdkVersion` than 35 is available: 36
A newer version of androidx.test.ext:junit than 1.2.1 is available: 1.3.0
A newer version of androidx.test.espresso:espresso-core than 3.6.1 is available: 3.7.0
A newer version of androidx.appcompat:appcompat than 1.7.0 is available: 1.7.1
A newer version of com.google.android.material:material than 1.12.0 is available: 1.13.0
A newer version of androidx.activity:activity than 1.9.3 is available: 1.13.0
A newer version of androidx.constraintlayout:constraintlayout than 2.2.0 is available: 2.2.1
A newer version of androidx.core:core-splashscreen than 1.0.1 is available: 1.2.0
A newer version of androidx.recyclerview:recyclerview than 1.3.2 is available: 1.4.0
A newer version of com.squareup.retrofit2:converter-gson than 2.11.0 is available: 3.0.0
A newer version of com.squareup.retrofit2:retrofit than 2.11.0 is available: 3.0.0
A newer version of com.squareup.okhttp3:logging-interceptor than 4.12.0 is available: 5.3.2
A newer version of com.airbnb.android:lottie than 6.6.0 is available: 6.7.1
A newer version of com.google.code.gson:gson than 2.10.1 is available: 2.13.2

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).
Must use `app:tint` instead of `android:tint`
Must use `app:tint` instead of `android:tint`
Avoid object allocations during draw/layout operations (preallocate and reuse instead)
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.

This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 26. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
Do not place Android context classes in static fields (static reference to `IslandController` which has field `appCtx` pointing to `Context`); this is a memory leak
